properties.Test Case: When switching from one collection to another, ensure Bloom does not lose focus.
properties.Steps: When switching from one collection to another, ensure Bloom does not lose focus.

properties.Test Case: TEST SETUP: There are three permissions categories on Bloom Library: Regular user, Collection Editor, and Moderator. To test, you will need an account from all three categories. The following presumes you have Collection Editor permission for the "Pratham" bookshelf.
properties.Steps: TEST SETUP: There are three permissions categories on Bloom Library: Regular user, Collection Editor, and Moderator. To test, you will need an account from all three categories. The following presumes you have Collection Editor permission for the "Pratham" bookshelf.

properties.Test Case: Badges: Book thumbnail badges indicating Bloom Library status. There are four statuses seen here. 1) uploaded & harvested 2) waiting for harvester 3) uploaded as draft 4) uploaded and removed from publication. Completion of harvesting -- movement from State (2) to (1) or (2) to 3) -- will only be shown after re-booting Bloom. Likewise, state (4) is only detected after initial re-boot (or changing collections). Test bulk upload.
properties.Steps: Badges: Book thumbnail badges indicating Bloom Library status. There are four statuses seen here. 1) uploaded & harvested 2) waiting for harvester 3) uploaded as draft 4) uploaded and removed from publication. Completion of harvesting -- movement from State (2) to (1) or (2) to 3) -- will only be shown after re-booting Bloom. Likewise, state (4) is only detected after initial re-boot (or changing collections). Test bulk upload.

properties.Test Case: MY BOOKS: Sign in as a regular user, click on the top right avatar, and choose My Books. Click on any book. You should have see "You have permission to modify this book". Go to any book not in "My Books" --> the permissions are hidden.
properties.Steps: MY BOOKS: Sign in as a regular user, click on the top right avatar, and choose My Books. Click on any book. You should have see "You have permission to modify this book". Go to any book not in "My Books" --> the permissions are hidden.

properties.Test Case: DOWNLOAD INTO BLOOM FOR EDITING: When logged in as a Regular user, the "download for editing" button should only be available for "My Books" and no others; for a Collection Editor, the button is present for all books in the collection, or "My Books" (but no others); for a Moderator, all books have the button.
properties.Steps: DOWNLOAD INTO BLOOM FOR EDITING:  When logged in as a Regular user, the "download for editing" button should only be available for "My Books" and no others; for a Collection Editor, the button is present for all books in the collection, or "My Books" (but no others); for a Moderator, all books have the button.
